description: Get ready to float in comfort and style with these lightweight Hispana floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. UpperSynthetic straps on the forefoot, collar and ankle, with velcro fastners for the forefoot and  ankle straps to attain a snug FitPadded inner lining for the straps for greater comfort Printed logo on the forefoot and ankle strap Cushioned footbed with slightly elevated triangle and bee hive pattern for a soft massage feel and all-day comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for durability, grip and tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfort
